bluetooth_confirm.title: Add NBPower Charger
bluetooth_confirm.description:
Found device **{name}**

MAC: `{mac}`

Confirm to add it to Home Assistant.

pick_device.title: Choose a charger
pick_device.description: Nearby NBPower devices were found. Pick one or enter a MAC address manually.

manual.title: Add NBPower Charger manually
manual.description: Enter the MAC address of your charger. Find it in the NBPowen app or via nRF Connect.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect. Check the MAC address and make sure the charger is powered on.
error.invalid_mac: Invalid MAC address format. Example: AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF
